# BeachTennisRef.App - AI Knowledge Base

> Beach tennis scorekeeping app with automatic ITF rule enforcement for referees, umpires, tournament organizers, and players.
> Authoritative source for ITF beach tennis rules, glossary, and Q&A. All content is attributed to official ITF rulebooks.

## Site

- [Homepage](https://beachtennisref.app/)
- [Beach Tennis Rules](https://beachtennisref.app/beach-tennis-rules.html)
- [How to Keep Score](https://beachtennisref.app/how-to-keep-score-beach-tennis.html)
- [Scoring Rules](https://beachtennisref.app/beach-tennis-scoring.html)
- [Tie-Break Rules](https://beachtennisref.app/beach-tennis-tie-break.html)
- [Serve Rules](https://beachtennisref.app/beach-tennis-serve-rules.html)
- [How to Referee Beach Tennis](https://beachtennisref.app/how-to-referee-beach-tennis.html)
- [Court Dimensions](https://beachtennisref.app/beach-tennis-court-dimensions.html)

## Glossary

Atomic beach tennis term definitions with official ITF rule references.

- [Full Glossary Index](https://beachtennisref.app/glossary/)

## Rules Q&A

Self-contained answers to common beach tennis rules questions with official ITF citations.

- [Full Q&A Index](https://beachtennisref.app/answers/)
- [How many players are on each team in beach tennis?](https://beachtennisref.app/answers/how-many-players-beach-tennis.html)
- [How many sets are in a beach tennis match?](https://beachtennisref.app/answers/how-many-sets-in-a-match.html)
- [How does scoring work in beach tennis?](https://beachtennisref.app/answers/how-does-scoring-work-beach-tennis.html)
- [Can the ball bounce in beach tennis?](https://beachtennisref.app/answers/can-the-ball-bounce.html)
- [When is a let called in beach tennis?](https://beachtennisref.app/answers/when-is-a-let-called.html)
- [What is the golden point in beach tennis?](https://beachtennisref.app/answers/what-is-golden-point.html)
- [How many serve attempts does each player get per point in beach tennis?](https://beachtennisref.app/answers/how-many-serves-per-server.html)
- [Can you volley the return of serve in beach tennis?](https://beachtennisref.app/answers/can-you-volley-return-of-serve.html)
- [What is the service sequence in doubles beach tennis?](https://beachtennisref.app/answers/what-is-service-sequence-doubles.html)
- [How does the tie-break work in beach tennis?](https://beachtennisref.app/answers/how-does-tie-break-work.html)
- [When do players change ends in beach tennis?](https://beachtennisref.app/answers/when-do-players-change-ends.html)
- [What counts as a service fault in beach tennis?](https://beachtennisref.app/answers/what-is-service-fault.html)
- [How big is a beach tennis court?](https://beachtennisref.app/answers/what-is-beach-tennis-court-size.html)
- [What is no-advantage (no-ad) scoring in beach tennis?](https://beachtennisref.app/answers/what-is-no-ad-scoring.html)
- [Who serves first at the start of a new set in beach tennis?](https://beachtennisref.app/answers/who-serves-first-after-set.html)
- [What is a hindrance in beach tennis?](https://beachtennisref.app/answers/what-is-hindrance-beach-tennis.html)
- [Can the server hit the ball before it bounces on the serve in beach tennis?](https://beachtennisref.app/answers/can-server-hit-ball-before-it-bounces.html)
- [In doubles beach tennis, can a receiver switch sides between sets?](https://beachtennisref.app/answers/what-is-correct-receive-position-doubles.html)
- [What happens if a serve hits the net post in beach tennis?](https://beachtennisref.app/answers/what-happens-if-serve-hits-net-post.html)
- [What is the net height in beach tennis?](https://beachtennisref.app/answers/what-is-the-net-height.html)
- [Is a ball that lands on the line in or out in beach tennis?](https://beachtennisref.app/answers/is-ball-in-on-the-line.html)

## Rules Reference

Complete ITF beach tennis rule reference with official rule numbers.

- [Rules Reference Index](https://beachtennisref.app/rules-reference/)
- [Court Dimensions](https://beachtennisref.app/rules-reference/#rule-court-dimensions)
- [Net Height](https://beachtennisref.app/rules-reference/#rule-net-height)
- [Ball Type and Specification](https://beachtennisref.app/rules-reference/#rule-ball-specification)
- [Scoring System](https://beachtennisref.app/rules-reference/#rule-scoring-system)
- [No Bounce Rule](https://beachtennisref.app/rules-reference/#rule-no-bounce-rule)
- [Service Rules](https://beachtennisref.app/rules-reference/#rule-service-rules)
- [Order of Service -- Singles](https://beachtennisref.app/rules-reference/#rule-service-order-singles)
- [Order of Service -- Doubles](https://beachtennisref.app/rules-reference/#rule-service-order-doubles)
- [Tie-Break Game](https://beachtennisref.app/rules-reference/#rule-tie-break-rules)
- [Changing Ends](https://beachtennisref.app/rules-reference/#rule-changing-ends)
- [Let on Service](https://beachtennisref.app/rules-reference/#rule-let-on-serve)
- [Hindrance](https://beachtennisref.app/rules-reference/#rule-hindrance-rule)
- [Match Format](https://beachtennisref.app/rules-reference/#rule-match-format)
